definitions.name: MULTI YES
definitions.documentation: Set AMOS task priority to normal (0). Restores normal multitasking.

definitions.name: MULTI NO
definitions.documentation: Turn off multitasking, giving more CPU time to AMOS. Warning: disables keyboard under AMOS (not AMOS Pro). Use Left Click and Raw Key for input when multitasking is off.

definitions.name: LSL.B
definitions.documentation: Logical shift left of the lower 8 bits of value by shift count. Returns the result.

definitions.name: LSL.W
definitions.documentation: Logical shift left of the lower 16 bits of value by shift count. Returns the result.

definitions.name: LSL.L
definitions.documentation: Logical shift left of the full 32-bit longword of value by shift count. Returns the result.

definitions.name: LSR.B
definitions.documentation: Logical shift right of the lower 8 bits of value by shift count. Returns the result.

definitions.name: LSR.W
definitions.documentation: Logical shift right of the lower 16 bits of value by shift count. Returns the result.

definitions.name: LSR.L
definitions.documentation: Logical shift right of the full 32-bit longword of value by shift count. Returns the result.

definitions.name: L SWAP
definitions.documentation: Swap the lower 16 bits with the upper 16 bits of a longword. Returns the result.

definitions.name: TEST.B
definitions.documentation: Compare the lower 8 bits of x with the lower 8 bits of y. Returns -1 if equal, 0 if not. Equivalent to (x And $FF)=(y And $FF).

definitions.name: TEST.W
definitions.documentation: Compare the lower 16 bits of x with the lower 16 bits of y. Returns -1 if equal, 0 if not. Equivalent to (x And $FFFF)=(y And $FFFF).

definitions.name: VBL WAIT
definitions.documentation: Wait until the raster beam has reached scan line x (0-256). More precise than Wait Vbl and works even with multitasking disabled.

definitions.name: RESERVE CHECK
definitions.documentation: Reserve memory for x TURBO check zones. Must be called before Set Check.

definitions.name: CHECK ERASE
definitions.documentation: Release memory used by Reserve Check and erase all check zone definitions.

definitions.name: CHECK
definitions.documentation: Check if coordinates x,y fall within any check zone from start to end. Returns 1 if inside a zone, 0 if not.

definitions.name: SET CHECK
definitions.documentation: Define check zone z as the rectangular screen area from x1,y1 to x2,y2.

signatures.presentation: Set Check z, x1, y1 To x2, y2

definitions.name: RESET CHECK
definitions.documentation: Erase the definition of check zone z.

definitions.name: HIT SPR ZONE
definitions.documentation: Check if sprite n (offset by dx,dy from its hot spot) is inside any AMOS zone. Returns the zone number or 0.

definitions.name: HIT BOB ZONE
definitions.documentation: Check if bob n (offset by dx,dy from its hot spot) is inside any AMOS zone. Returns the zone number or 0.

definitions.name: HIT SPR CHECK
definitions.documentation: Check if sprite n (offset by dx,dy) is inside any TURBO check zone from start to end. Returns 1 if inside, 0 if not.

signatures.presentation: Hit Spr Check(start To end, dx, dy, n)

definitions.name: RAW KEY
definitions.documentation: Check if key with scancode n is currently pressed. Works even when multitasking is disabled. Returns -1 if pressed.

definitions.name: R MOVE
definitions.documentation: Move the graphics cursor by dx,dy relative to its current position. Equivalent to Gr Locate Xgr+dx,Ygr+dy.

definitions.name: R DRAW
definitions.documentation: Draw a line from the current graphics cursor position by dx,dy relative offset. Cursor moves to end of line.

definitions.name: R BOX
definitions.documentation: Draw a box relative to the current graphics cursor position using dx,dy as the opposite corner offset.

definitions.name: R HOME
definitions.documentation: Move the graphics cursor home (0,0) relative to the screen.

definitions.name: R BAR
definitions.documentation: Draw a filled bar relative to the current graphics cursor using dx,dy as the opposite corner offset.

definitions.name: RESERVE OBJECT
definitions.documentation: Reserve memory for object number object with count vector definitions. Use 'Reserve Object' for chip memory.

definitions.name: DEFINE DRAW
definitions.documentation: Define vector element in object as a Draw instruction to coordinates x,y.

signatures.presentation: Define Draw object, element To x, y

definitions.name: DEFINE MOVE
definitions.documentation: Define vector element in object as a Move instruction to coordinates x,y (no line drawn).

signatures.presentation: Define Move object, element To x, y

definitions.name: DEFINE STOP
definitions.documentation: Define vector element in object as a Stop instruction (marks end of object definition).

definitions.name: DEFINE ATTR
definitions.documentation: Define vector element in object as an Attribute instruction changing colour and draw mode.

signatures.presentation: Define Attr object, element To colour, drawmode

definitions.name: OBJECT DRAW
definitions.documentation: Draw vector object to the current screen.

definitions.name: R OBJECT DRAW
definitions.documentation: Draw vector object relative to screen coordinates x,y.

signatures.presentation: R Object Draw object, x, y

definitions.name: OBJECT MAG DRAW
definitions.documentation: Draw vector object scaled by factor mul. Positive mul enlarges, negative divides.

definitions.name: R OBJECT MAG DRAW
definitions.documentation: Draw vector object relative to x,y and scaled by factor mul.

signatures.presentation: R Object Mag Draw object, x, y, mul

definitions.name: OBJECT ERASE
definitions.documentation: Erase object definition and free its memory. If object is negative, erase all objects.

definitions.name: LINE 3D
definitions.documentation: Draw a 3D perspective line from x,y,z to x1,y1,z1. Uses Eye 3d for the vanishing point.

signatures.presentation: Line 3d x, y, z To x1, y1, z1

definitions.name: EYE 3D
definitions.documentation: Set the vanishing point for Line 3d to screen coordinates x,y. Default is 160,100.

definitions.name: OBJECT SAVE
definitions.documentation: Save chip objects from start to end into file name.

signatures.presentation: Object Save name, start To end

definitions.name: OBJECT LOAD
definitions.documentation: Load object file name and place objects starting at index start.

definitions.name: BLIT STORE LEFT
definitions.documentation: Predefine horizontal scroll zone blitnr on screen. Area from x,y to x1,y1. Positive shift scrolls right, negative left (range -15 to +15).

signatures.presentation: Blit Store Left screen, blitnr, x, y To x1, y1, shift

definitions.name: MULTI BLIT
definitions.documentation: Execute all predefined scroll zones from start to end. Zones must be defined with Blit Store Left/Up.

definitions.name: BLIT ERASE
definitions.documentation: Free memory used by scroll zone blitnr. If blitnr is negative, erase all blit definitions.

definitions.name: BLIT SPEED
definitions.documentation: Change the shift (speed) value of a previously defined scroll zone.

definitions.name: BLIT LEFT
definitions.documentation: Immediately execute a horizontal scroll on screen from x,y to x1,y1 with given shift.

signatures.presentation: Blit Left screen, x, y To x1, y1, shift

definitions.name: F PLOT
definitions.documentation: Plot a point of colour at x,y on the current screen. 2-3x faster than standard AMOS Plot.

definitions.name: BLIT CLEAR
definitions.documentation: Clear bitplane x of the current screen. If x<0 all bitplanes are cleared. About 80% faster than Cls.

definitions.name: LEFT CLICK
definitions.documentation: Check the left mouse button. Works even when multitasking is disabled. Returns -1 if pressed.

definitions.name: RESERVE STARS
definitions.documentation: Reserve memory for count star definitions on the current screen.

definitions.name: DEFINE STAR
definitions.documentation: Define star nr at initial position x,y with x speed and y speed.

signatures.presentation: Define Star nr, x, y, xspeed, yspeed

definitions.name: DISPLAY STARS
definitions.documentation: Display all stars and compute their next position. Equivalent to Stars Draw : Stars Compute.

definitions.name: STARS ERASE
definitions.documentation: Free the memory used by Reserve Stars.

definitions.name: STARS COMPUTE
definitions.documentation: Compute the next position of stars from start to end without displaying them.

definitions.name: STARS DRAW
definitions.documentation: Display all stars on screen without computing their next position.

definitions.name: STARS SPEED
definitions.documentation: Change the x and y speed of stars from start to end.

signatures.presentation: Stars Speed start To end, xspeed, yspeed

definitions.name: STARS CLIP
definitions.documentation: Limit all stars to the rectangular screen region from x,y (top-left) to x1,y1 (bottom-right).

signatures.presentation: Stars Clip x, y, x1, y1

definitions.name: F POINT
definitions.documentation: Return the colour register of the pixel at x,y. 2-3x faster than standard AMOS Point.

definitions.name: F CIRCLE
definitions.documentation: Draw a circle centered at x,y with given radius and colour. Up to 550% faster than standard Circle.

signatures.presentation: F Circle x, y, radius, colour

definitions.name: F SQR
definitions.documentation: Fast integer square root. Returns the integer square root of value.

definitions.name: STARS INT ON
definitions.documentation: Add a VBL interrupt server that calls Display Stars every vertical blank. If clear is non-zero, bitplane 1 is cleared before drawing.

definitions.name: STARS INT OFF
definitions.documentation: Remove the stars VBL interrupt server.

definitions.name: BLIT INT ON
definitions.documentation: Add a VBL interrupt server that calls Multi Blit start To end every vertical blank. Scrolling begins when Blit Int Wait is False.

signatures.presentation: Blit Int On start To end

definitions.name: BLIT INT OFF
definitions.documentation: Remove the blitter VBL interrupt server.

definitions.name: F DRAW
definitions.documentation: Fast line draw. With two coordinates draws from current graphics position to x,y. With four coordinates draws from x,y to x1,y1. Up to 200% faster than standard Draw.

signatures.presentation: F Draw x, y To x1, y1

definitions.name: OBJECT LIMIT
definitions.documentation: Set the maximum number of vector objects. Must be called before Reserve Object. Set to 0 to free all object memory.

definitions.name: SET PLANES
definitions.documentation: Restrict drawing operations to a set of bitplanes defined by mask (each bit = one plane). Reset to 255 after use.

definitions.name: PLANE OFFSET
definitions.documentation: Set the x/y display offset for bitplane planenr of screen scrnr. Use negative planenr to reset all planes.

signatures.presentation: Plane Offset scrnr, planenr, xoffset, yoffset

definitions.name: PLANE SWAP
definitions.documentation: Swap bitplane plane1 with bitplane plane2 on screen scrnr.

definitions.name: PLANE SHIFT UP
definitions.documentation: Shift bitplanes from start to end up by one on screen scrnr.

signatures.presentation: Plane Shift Up scrnr, start To end

definitions.name: PLANE SHIFT DOWN
definitions.documentation: Shift bitplanes from start to end down by one on screen scrnr.

signatures.presentation: Plane Shift Down scrnr, start To end

definitions.name: PLANE UPDATE
definitions.documentation: Apply pending plane changes to the display. Use instead of AMOS View command when using Plane commands.

definitions.name: F PASTE ICON
definitions.documentation: Fast general-purpose icon paste at x,y. X is aligned to 16-bit boundary. Masking supported. 2-3.5x faster than Paste Icon.

signatures.presentation: F Paste Icon x, y, icon

definitions.name: F 32 ICON
definitions.documentation: Optimised icon paste for icons 17 to 32 pixels wide, any height. Masking supported.

definitions.name: F 16 ICON
definitions.documentation: Optimised icon paste for icons 1 to 16 pixels wide, any height. Masking supported. 2.5-3.5x faster than Paste Icon.

definitions.name: F 16PROC ICON
definitions.documentation: CPU-based icon paste for exactly 16-pixel wide icons. Faster than blitter on 68020+. No masking support.

definitions.name: F 32PROC ICON
definitions.documentation: CPU-based icon paste for exactly 32-pixel wide icons. Equivalent to F 16proc Icon but for 32-pixel icons.

definitions.name: X ICON
definitions.documentation: Return the width in words of icon nr.

definitions.name: Y ICON
definitions.documentation: Return the height in lines of icon nr.

definitions.name: PLANES ICON
definitions.documentation: Return the number of bitplanes of icon nr.

definitions.name: MATH INFO
definitions.documentation: Return the math coprocessor type: 0=none, 881=MC68881, 882=MC68882.

definitions.name: F PUT BLOCK
definitions.documentation: Fast general-purpose block display at x,y. X aligned to 16-bit boundary. Masking supported. 20-180% faster than Put Block.

signatures.presentation: F Put Block block, x, y

definitions.name: RESERVE STATIC BLOCK
definitions.documentation: Reserve memory for converting x AMOS blocks from a linked list to a static list. Reserves x*8 bytes.

definitions.name: STATIC BLOCK ERASE
definitions.documentation: Return the memory used by the static block list.

definitions.name: BUILD STATIC BLOCK
definitions.documentation: Convert AMOS's linked block list into a static block list for faster access.

definitions.name: F PUT STATIC BLOCK
definitions.documentation: Fast static block display at x,y. Uses pre-built static block list for 40-260% speedup over Put Block.

signatures.presentation: F Put Static Block block, x, y

definitions.name: SCENE BANK
definitions.documentation: Specify which memory bank contains the scene data.

definitions.name: SCENE CHECK
definitions.documentation: Return the icon number at scene coordinates x,y minus 1. Add 1 before pasting.

definitions.name: SCENE 16 CHECK
definitions.documentation: Return the icon number at screen coordinates x,y according to the viewport (16x16 icon scenes).

definitions.name: SCENE CHANGE
definitions.documentation: Change the tile at scene coordinates x,y to value v.

definitions.name: SCENE 16 CHANGE
definitions.documentation: Change the tile at screen coordinates x,y to value v (16x16 icon scenes). Updates both screen and bank.

definitions.name: SCENE 16 DRAW
definitions.documentation: Fast scene draw for 16x16 pixel icons. Draw xamt*yamt icons starting from scene coordinates scenex,sceney to screen position xscreen,yscreen.

signatures.presentation: Scene 16 Draw scenex, sceney, xamt, yamt, xscreen, yscreen

definitions.name: SCENE 16 DEF
definitions.documentation: Store a scene 16 draw definition for use with Scene 16 Restore. scr=screen, n=definition number.

signatures.presentation: Scene 16 Def scr, n, scenex, sceney, xamt, yamt, xscreen, yscreen

definitions.name: SCENE 16 RESTORE
definitions.documentation: Draw the scene 16 definition nr onto the screen.

definitions.name: SCENE 16 LIMIT
definitions.documentation: Allocate memory for x scene 16 definitions. Set to 0 to free memory.

definitions.name: SCENE 32 CHECK
definitions.documentation: Return the icon number at screen coordinates x,y according to the viewport (32x32 icon scenes).

definitions.name: SCENE 32 CHANGE
definitions.documentation: Change the tile at screen coordinates x,y to value v (32x32 icon scenes). Updates both screen and bank.

definitions.name: SCENE 32 DRAW
definitions.documentation: Fast scene draw for 32x32 pixel icons. Draw xamt*yamt icons starting from scene coordinates scenex,sceney to screen position xscreen,yscreen.

signatures.presentation: Scene 32 Draw scenex, sceney, xamt, yamt, xscreen, yscreen

definitions.name: SCENE 16 VIEW
definitions.documentation: Set up a viewport for Scene 16 Do/Left/Right/Top/Bottom commands on screen scrnr, from x1,y1 to x2,y2.

signatures.presentation: Scene 16 View scrnr, x1, y1 To x2, y2

definitions.name: SCENE 32 VIEW
definitions.documentation: Set up a viewport for Scene 32 Do/Left/Right/Top/Bottom commands on screen scrnr, from x1,y1 to x2,y2.

signatures.presentation: Scene 32 View scrnr, x1, y1 To x2, y2

definitions.name: SCENE 16 DO
definitions.documentation: Fill the viewport (set by Scene 16 View) with the scene starting at scene coordinates xscene,yscene.

definitions.name: SCENE 32 DO
definitions.documentation: Fill the viewport (set by Scene 32 View) with the scene starting at scene coordinates xscene,yscene.

definitions.name: SCENE 16 TOP
definitions.documentation: Redraw the top edge of the viewport with scene starting at xscene,yscene (16x16 icons).

definitions.name: SCENE 32 TOP
definitions.documentation: Redraw the top edge of the viewport with scene starting at xscene,yscene (32x32 icons).

definitions.name: SCENE 16 BOTTOM
definitions.documentation: Redraw the bottom edge of the viewport with scene starting at xscene,yscene (16x16 icons).

definitions.name: SCENE 32 BOTTOM
definitions.documentation: Redraw the bottom edge of the viewport with scene starting at xscene,yscene (32x32 icons).

definitions.name: SCENE 16 LEFT
definitions.documentation: Redraw the left edge of the viewport with scene starting at xscene,yscene (16x16 icons).

definitions.name: SCENE 32 LEFT
definitions.documentation: Redraw the left edge of the viewport with scene starting at xscene,yscene (32x32 icons).

definitions.name: SCENE 16 RIGHT
definitions.documentation: Redraw the right edge of the viewport with scene starting at xscene,yscene (16x16 icons).

definitions.name: SCENE 32 RIGHT
definitions.documentation: Redraw the right edge of the viewport with scene starting at xscene,yscene (32x32 icons).

definitions.name: SCENE X
definitions.documentation: Return the width (number of tiles horizontally) of the current scene bank.

definitions.name: SCENE Y
definitions.documentation: Return the height (number of tiles vertically) of the current scene bank.

definitions.name: AMOS PRI
definitions.documentation: Set the AmigaOS priority of the AMOS task. Range -128 to 20. Default is 0.

definitions.name: BIT FIELD INS
definitions.documentation: Insert width bits from value into var starting at startbit. Returns the modified value.

signatures.presentation: Bit Field Ins(var, startbit, width, value)

definitions.name: BIT FIELD EXT
definitions.documentation: Extract width bits from var starting at startbit. Returns the extracted bits.

definitions.name: HIT BOB CHECK
definitions.documentation: Check if bob n (offset by dx,dy) is inside any TURBO check zone from start to end. Returns 1 if inside, 0 if not.

signatures.presentation: Hit Bob Check(start To end, dx, dy, n)

definitions.name: BYTE HUNT
definitions.documentation: Search memory from start to end for a byte value. action=0: exact match of val1; action=1: range val1 To val2 (inside); action=-1: outside val1 To val2. Returns address or 0.

signatures.presentation: Byte Hunt(start To end, action, val1 To val2)

definitions.name: WORKBENCH OPEN
definitions.documentation: Reopen the Workbench screen if sufficient memory is available.

definitions.name: SCENE LOAD
definitions.documentation: Load scene file into memory bank. Use Scene Bank afterwards to activate it.

definitions.name: MEMORY FILL
definitions.documentation: Fill memory from start to end with the repeating pattern in string variable.

signatures.presentation: Memory Fill start To end, pattern

definitions.name: BLIT INT CHANGE
definitions.documentation: Change which blit zones are executed by the blitter interrupt (start To end) without turning the interrupt off.

signatures.presentation: Blit Int Change start To end

definitions.name: BLIT INT WAIT
definitions.documentation: Set the blitter interrupt wait flag. True=pause execution; False=resume. Initially True at program start.

definitions.name: RANGE
definitions.documentation: Return var clamped to the range lowvalue To highvalue. Equivalent to Min(highvalue, Max(var, lowvalue)).

definitions.name: TEXP
definitions.documentation: Ternary expression: evaluate ex. If true (-1) return trueval, if false (0) return falseval.

definitions.name: BLIT UP
definitions.documentation: Immediately execute a vertical scroll on screen from x,y to x1,y1 with given shift.

signatures.presentation: Blit Up screen, x, y To x1, y1, shift

definitions.name: BLIT STORE UP
definitions.documentation: Predefine vertical scroll zone blitnr on screen. Area from x,y to x1,y1. Positive shift scrolls down, negative scrolls up.

signatures.presentation: Blit Store Up screen, blitnr, x, y To x1, y1, shift

definitions.name: ICON CHECK
definitions.documentation: Check if icon x is defined. Returns -1 if defined without mask, 1 if defined with mask, 0 if not defined.

definitions.name: SCENE ICON BANK
definitions.documentation: Assign icon bank x for use with the Scene commands. Default is bank 2.

definitions.name: T CLIP
definitions.documentation: Clip var to the nearest lower multiple of clipat. Returns (var/clipat)*clipat.

definitions.name: BETWEEN
definitions.documentation: Return true if value is between low and high (inclusive). Low and high are swapped if out of order.

definitions.name: SCENE PALETTE
definitions.documentation: Load the palette from icon bank x into the current screen, respecting Scene Mask Palette.

definitions.name: SCENE MASK PALETTE
definitions.documentation: Set the colour mask for Scene Palette. Each bit represents a colour. Set bits are replaced when Scene Palette runs.

definitions.name: BANK END
definitions.documentation: Return the end address of memory bank banknumber. Returns negative count for sprite/icon banks.

definitions.name: SCENE SCAN X
definitions.documentation: Scan a rectangular area of the scene for a tile value. Returns the X coordinate of the first match.

signatures.presentation: Scene Scan X(bank, x, y, value)

definitions.name: SCENE SCAN Y
definitions.documentation: Scan a rectangular area of the scene for a tile value. Returns the Y coordinate of the first match.

signatures.presentation: Scene Scan Y(bank, x, y, value)

definitions.name: SCENE COPY
definitions.documentation: Copy a rectangular area of tiles from one scene bank to another.

signatures.presentation: Scene Copy bank_from, scenex, sceney, amountx, amounty To bank_to, destx, desty

definitions.name: SCENE FILL
definitions.documentation: Fill a rectangular area of scene bank with the tile value.

signatures.presentation: Scene Fill bank, scenex, sceney, amountx, amounty, value

definitions.name: SCENE CONVERT
definitions.documentation: Convert a V1.0 byte-format scene bank to V2.0 word-format.

definitions.name: RESERVE SCENE
definitions.documentation: Reserve a new scene bank with width*height tiles, all initialised to 0.

definitions.name: WORD HUNT
definitions.documentation: Search memory from start to end for a 16-bit word value. Same action parameter as Byte Hunt but for words. Start and end are automatically even-aligned.

signatures.presentation: Word Hunt(start To end, action, val1 To val2)

definitions.name: SCENE REPLACE
definitions.documentation: Search and replace all occurrences of ic_search with ic_replace in a rectangular area of scene bank.

signatures.presentation: Scene Replace bank, xstart, ystart, xamount, yamount, ic_search, ic_replace

definitions.name: CHIP LARGEST
definitions.documentation: Return the size in bytes of the largest contiguous chip memory block.

definitions.name: FAST LARGEST
definitions.documentation: Return the size in bytes of the largest contiguous fast memory block.

definitions.name: STRING HUNT
definitions.documentation: Search memory from start to end for a string pattern. action and step control search direction and stride. Returns address of match or 0.

signatures.presentation: String Hunt(start To end, action, step, pattern)

definitions.name: RIGHT CLICK
definitions.documentation: Check the right mouse button. Works even when multitasking is disabled. Returns -1 if pressed.

definitions.name: IS RAW KEY
definitions.documentation: Return the last key press in raw (scancode) format. Works even when multitasking is disabled.

definitions.name: MULTI BLOAD
definitions.documentation: Load file1 and file2 into memory starting at address. Loads asynchronously.

definitions.name: MULTI BL ERROR
definitions.documentation: Signal an error in the multi-bload operation.

definitions.name: MULTI BL ENDED
definitions.documentation: Return true when a Multi Bload operation has completed.

definitions.name: PARSE$
definitions.documentation: Parse string source starting at position pos for delimiter delim. Returns the extracted token and updates pos.

definitions.name: MOVE MEM
definitions.documentation: Copy length bytes from address src to address dest.

signatures.presentation: Move Mem src, length To dest

definitions.name: DEBUG
definitions.documentation: Trigger a TURBO Plus debug breakpoint.
